title: Simple Bedrock and Obsidian
description: This resource pack makes bedrock and obsidian simpler and more easy too look at.
body: Simple Bedrock and Obsidian is a texture pack that makes the textures of bedrock and obsidaian more simple and plesent. When playing anarchy, pvp, or any other servers, bedrock and obsidan are common blocks that people use all the time. They are amazing blocks that can be used for multiple functions and this pack will make them easier to look at.
